# kemp_config_interface (Data Source)

Reads a network interface from a Kemp LoadMaster by its zero-based index.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kemp_config_interface" "eth0" {
  id = 0
}

output "eth0_ip" {
  value = data.kemp_config_interface.eth0.ip_address
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) **Required.** Zero-based index of the interface (e.g. `0` for eth0).

### Read-Only

- `additional_addresses` (List of String) Computed. Additional IP addresses assigned to the interface.
- `default_interface` (Boolean) Computed. Whether this is the default interface.
- `geo_traffic_enabled` (Boolean) Computed. Whether GEO traffic is enabled on this interface.
- `interface_type` (String) Computed. Interface type (e.g. `Port`).
- `ip_address` (String) Computed. Primary IP address of the interface in CIDR notation.
- `mtu` (Number) Computed. MTU of the interface.
